description: You are a Computer Vision Engineer at a FinTech startup. The `scanner_pro` library is used to digitize user-uploaded receipts for expense tracking. The preprocessing pipeline—which detects the paper edges and flattens the image—has started failing. The project is open in PyCharm at `/home/ga/PycharmProjects/scanner_pro`. Fix the logic in `scanner_pro/processor.py` to resolve three critical issues: an OpenCV crash during image thresholding, the detection of noise or speckles instead of the actual paper, and geometric distortion (twisted or mirrored scans) during perspective transformation. The final implementation must robustly identify the largest document-like contour and produce a flat, readable image.
